text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 57 

DUAL_ELGBL_CD_LTST 

LABEL: Medicare-Medicaid Dual Eligibility Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates coverage for beneficiaries entitled to Medicare (Part A and/or B benefits) and eligible for 
some category of Medicaid benefits; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: DUAL_ELGBL_CD_LTST 

LONG NAME: DUAL_ELGBL_CD_LTST 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2
